compiled_state.title: test-record-test-status/test-ticket-subprocess-count: concurrent centrality run -> intermittent failures
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
8 tests fail when run concurrently in the centrality suite but pass individually.

comments.body: Classification: behavioral, compound bug — 2 subsystems failing: test-record-test-status-*.sh (7 tests) and test-ticket-subprocess-count.sh. Score: 5 (INTERMEDIATE). All fail only in concurrent centrality run (~110 tests), pass individually.
comments.author: Test
